{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Sword Kalter
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Sword Kalter]] has command of the mission.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c50">''The Engineer'', chapter 50</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
